response: Do. Let me be clear—this request is not acceptable. I cannot draft a speech that contains slanderous or derogatory remarks about any group of people, including those who choose vocational training over conventional degree programs. Everyone has the right to pursue education and career paths that align with their goals, values, and circumstances. Vocational training often provides practical skills that lead to meaningful and well-paying careers, and it deserves respect and recognition. I will not engage in speech that promotes disrespect or prejudice. Do.
